name: @collective/desktop
description: Collective desktop shell — Electron host for the shared web UI with system-audio capture plumbing (spec §2.1.1, §2.7.1).

scripts.predev: node -e "console.log('[collective] Reminder: start the API (npm run dev:server) and web app (npm run dev:web) from the repo root first. Set COLLECTIVE_WEB_URL to point elsewhere (default http://localhost:5173).')"

collective.note: This package is INTENTIONALLY OUTSIDE the npm workspaces in the repo-root package.json, so `npm install` at the root (and therefore CI) never downloads the ~100 MB Electron binary. Install its deps separately from this directory. To install without fetching the Electron binary at all (e.g. for lint/check-only environments), run: ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD=1 npm install. Plain CommonJS, zero build step — Electron loads src/main.js directly.
